expected_issues.description: onOpenChange receives a bare boolean: (isOpen: boolean) => void. Blade's convention is to use an object parameter so additional context can be added in future without a breaking change: ({ isOpen }: { isOpen: boolean }) => void.
The color prop type is written as Extract<FeedbackColors, 'negative'> which always resolves to the literal 'negative'. This adds unnecessary complexity — it should simply be color?: 'negative'.
The prop is named disabled instead of isDisabled. Blade's convention for boolean props is to use auxiliary verb prefixes (is/has/should/show). It should be isDisabled.
